---
title: PS270 Final Project
author: "Mallory Bottemiller"
description: "My final project"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---



## Project thoughts

I am interested in exploring data related to zebra muscle infestation in the Midwest. I have personally noticed an increase in this species throughout the past few years and would be curious to see the data related to it.
